scripts.pages:dev: npm run build && XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.wrangler npx wrangler pages dev ./dist --compatibility-date=2026-07-02
scripts.pages:env: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.wrangler npx wrangler pages secret bulk .dev.vars --project-name config-studio
scripts.pages:secrets:list: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.wrangler npx wrangler pages secret list --project-name config-studio
scripts.pages:deploy: npm run build && XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.wrangler npx wrangler pages deploy ./dist --project-name config-studio
